title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
